modelIdentification.name: SISO-STD-001.1-2025 - Real-time Platform Reference Physical FOM Module
modelIdentification.purpose: The RPR FOM supports interoperability for real-time, platform oriented defense simulation.
modelIdentification.description: This module provides object class definitions for representing physical entities including aircraft, ground vehicles, ships, life forms, ammunition, etc. In addition, it provides interaction classes to signal collisions between physical entities.

reference.identification: SISO-STD-001.1-2025 - Real-time Platform Reference Foundation FOM Module
SISO-STD-001.1-2025 - Real-time Platform Reference Enumerations FOM Module
SISO-STD-001.1-2025 - Real-time Platform Reference Base FOM Module
Standard for Guidance, Rationale, and Interoperability Modalities for the Real-time Platform Reference Federation Object Model (RPR FOM) SISO-STD-001-2025 4 November 2025
IEEE Standard for Distributed Interactive Simulation - Application Protocols IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 19 December 2012

modelIdentification.other:
Copyright © 2025 by the Simulation Interoperability Standards Organization, Inc. 7901 4th St N, Suite 300-4043 St Petersburg FL 33702 USA
All rights reserved.
Schema and API: SISO hereby grants a general, royalty-free license to copy, distribute, display, and make derivative works from this material, for all purposes, provided that any use of the material contains the following attribution: “Reprinted with permission from SISO Inc.” Should a reader require additional information, contact the SISO Inc. Board of Directors.
Documentation: SISO hereby grants a general, royalty-free license to copy, distribute, display, and make derivative works from this material, for noncommercial purposes, provided that any use of the material contains the following attribution: “Reprinted with permission from SISO Inc.” The material may not be used for a commercial purpose without express written permission from the SISO Inc. Board of Directors.
SISO Inc. Board of Directors 7901 4th St N, Suite 300-4043 St Petersburg FL 33702 USA

objectClass.name: PhysicalEntity
objectClass.semantics: A base class of all discrete platform scenario domain participants.

attribute.name: LVCIndicator
attribute.semantics: Indicates whether the data contained in this object instance is related to a Live, Virtual, or Constructive entity.

attribute.name: AcousticSignatureIndex
attribute.semantics: Index used to obtain the acoustics (sound through air) signature state of the entity.

attribute.name: AlternateEntityType
attribute.semantics: The category of entity to be used when viewed by entities on the 'opposite' side.

attribute.name: ForceIdentifier
attribute.semantics: The identification of the force that the entity belongs to.

attribute.name: InfraredSignatureIndex
attribute.semantics: Index used to obtain the infra-red signature state of the entity.

attribute.name: LiveEntityMeasuredSpeed
attribute.semantics: The entity's own measurement of speed (e.g. air speed for aircraft).

attribute.name: Marking
attribute.semantics: A unique marking or combination of characters used to distinguish the entity from other entities.

attribute.name: PropulsionSystemsData
attribute.semantics: The basic operating data of the propulsion systems aboard the entity.

attribute.name: RadarCrossSectionSignatureIndex
attribute.semantics: Index used to obtain the radar cross section signature state of the entity.

attribute.name: VectoringNozzleSystemData
attribute.semantics: The basic operational data for the vectoring nozzle systems aboard the entity.

attribute.name: ExtendedDamageStatus
attribute.semantics: Detailed information on damage sustained by the entity.

attribute.name: VariableParametersArray
attribute.semantics: Array of information on articulated parts, attached parts, and other data associated with an entity.

objectClass.name: Platform
objectClass.semantics: A physical object under the control of armed forces upon which sensor, communication, or weapon systems may be mounted.

attribute.notes: RPRnotePhysical6 RPRnotePhysical7 RPRnotePhysical8 RPRnotePhysical9 RPRnotePhysical10 RPRnotePhysical11
attribute.name: PaintScheme
attribute.semantics: Describes the visual paint design.

attribute.notes: RPRnotePhysical7 RPRnotePhysical8 RPRnotePhysical9 RPRnotePhysical10 RPRnotePhysical11 RPRnotePhysical12 RPRnotePhysical13
attribute.name: MobilityKilled
attribute.semantics: Describes whether it is capable of moving on its own power.

attribute.notes: RPRnotePhysical7 RPRnotePhysical8 RPRnotePhysical9 RPRnotePhysical10 RPRnotePhysical11 RPRnotePhysical14
attribute.name: Damage
attribute.semantics: Describes the damaged appearance.

attribute.notes: RPRnotePhysical7 RPRnotePhysical8 RPRnotePhysical9 RPRnotePhysical10 RPRnotePhysical11 RPRnotePhysical12
attribute.name: IsSmokeEmanating
attribute.semantics: Describes whether or not smoke is emanating from the entity.

attribute.notes: RPRnotePhysical7 RPRnotePhysical8 RPRnotePhysical9 RPRnotePhysical10 RPRnotePhysical11 RPRnotePhysical12
attribute.name: IsEngineEmittingSmoke
attribute.semantics: Describes whether or not the engine is emitting smoke.

attribute.notes: RPRnotePhysical7 RPRnotePhysical8 RPRnotePhysical9 RPRnotePhysical10 RPRnotePhysical11 RPRnotePhysical12
attribute.name: IsFlaming
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the entity is burning and flames are visible.

attribute.notes: RPRnotePhysical7 RPRnotePhysical8 RPRnotePhysical9 RPRnotePhysical10 RPRnotePhysical11 RPRnotePhysical12
attribute.name: PowerPlantOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the power plant is on or off.

attribute.notes: RPRnotePhysical12 RPRnotePhysical15 RPRnotePhysical16 RPRnotePhysical17 RPRnotePhysical18 RPRnotePhysical19
attribute.name: AmmunitionSupplyCapability
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the entity is able to supply some type of ammunition in response to an appropriate service request.

attribute.notes: RPRnotePhysical12 RPRnotePhysical15 RPRnotePhysical16 RPRnotePhysical17 RPRnotePhysical18 RPRnotePhysical19
attribute.name: FuelSupplyCapability
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the entity is able to supply some type of fuel in response to an appropriate service request.

attribute.notes: RPRnotePhysical12 RPRnotePhysical15 RPRnotePhysical16 RPRnotePhysical17 RPRnotePhysical18 RPRnotePhysical19
attribute.name: RecoveryCapability
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the entity is able to provide recovery (e.g., towing) services in response to an appropriate service request.

attribute.notes: RPRnotePhysical12 RPRnotePhysical15 RPRnotePhysical16 RPRnotePhysical17 RPRnotePhysical18 RPRnotePhysical19
attribute.name: RepairCapability
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the entity is able to supply certain repair services in response to an appropriate service request.

objectClass.name: Aircraft
objectClass.semantics: A platform entity that operates mainly in the air, such as aircraft, balloons, etc. This includes the entities when they are on the ground.

attribute.name: NVGMode
attribute.semantics: Describes whether air platform lighting is in covert or overt mode.

attribute.name: TrailingEffects
attribute.semantics: Describes the size of the contrails or ionization trailing effects.

attribute.name: CanopyTroopDoor
attribute.semantics: Describes the state of the canopy/troop door.

attribute.name: LandingLightsOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether landing lights are on or off.

attribute.name: NavigationLightsOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether navigation lights are on or off.

attribute.name: AntiCollisionLightsOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether Anti-Collision lights are on or off.

attribute.name: AfterburnerOn
attribute.semantics: Describes if the air platform is in afterburner.

attribute.name: LowerAntiCollisionLightOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the lower Anti-Collision light is on or off.

attribute.name: UpperAntiCollisionLightOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the upper Anti-Collision light is on or off.

attribute.name: AntiCollisionLightDayNight
attribute.semantics: Describes the day/night status of the Anti-Collision lights.

attribute.name: IsBlinking
attribute.semantics: Indicates whether any air platform lights are blinking or not.

attribute.name: FormationLightsOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether formation lights are on or off.

attribute.name: LandingGearExtended
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the landing gear is wholly retracted or extended.

attribute.name: CargoDoorsOpened
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the cargo doors (main door) are closed or open.

attribute.name: NavigationPositionBrightness
attribute.semantics: Describes the brightness of the navigation/position lights.

attribute.name: SpotSearchLight_1On
attribute.semantics: Describes whether spot/search light #1 is on or off.

attribute.name: InteriorLightsOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether interior lights are on or off.

attribute.name: ReverseThrustEngaged
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the air platform has engaged reverse thrust.

attribute.name: WeightOnWheels
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the air platform has weight on its main landing gear.

attribute.name: ADSBCapability
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the entity is equipped with Automatic Dependent Surveillance - Broadcast (ADS-B).

attribute.name: SlingLoadCarrierCapability
attribute.semantics: The Entity is able to carry a payload in a sling load. The extended appearance record (if available) will identify the current sling load status and entity association and/or entity offset records (if available) will provide additional sling load details (such as payload).

attribute.name: SlingLoadableCapability
attribute.semantics: The Entity is able to be carried as a sling load payload. The extended appearance record (if available) will identify if it is currently sling loaded and entity association and/or entity offset records (if available) will provide additional sling load details (such as carrier).

attribute.name: IEDPresenceIndicator
attribute.semantics: The Entity is an IED or contains an IED. The extended appearance record (if available) will identify how well hidden the IED is on the Entity. An Attached Part (if applicable, for instance a jury-rigged munition does not apply here) will identify the IED explicitly.

attribute.name: TaskOrganizableCapability
attribute.semantics: The Entity (normally a virtual manned module) can be task organized into an existing mixed mode unit (where mixed mode is intended to comprise a combination of computer-generated forces and virtual or even live forces).

attribute.name: LAIRCMCapability
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the entity is equipped with Large Aircraft Infrared Countermeasures (LAIRCM).

objectClass.name: AmphibiousVehicle
objectClass.semantics: A platform entity that can operate both on the land and the sea.

attribute.name: FirePowerKilled
attribute.semantics: Describes whether it can fire weapons.

attribute.name: TrailingEffects
attribute.semantics: Describes the size of the dust cloud or wake trailing effect.

attribute.name: PrimaryHatch
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the primary hatch is open or closed and whether someone is visible.

attribute.name: HeadLightsOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether head lights are on or off.

attribute.name: TailLightsOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether tail lights are on or off.

attribute.name: BrakeLightsOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether brake lights are on or off.

attribute.name: LauncherOperational
attribute.semantics: Describes the status of the mechanism required for the platform to be operational, such as the elevated status of the primary launcher.

attribute.name: CamouflageType
attribute.semantics: Describes the camouflage color.

attribute.name: ConcealedPosition
attribute.semantics: Describes the type of concealment.

attribute.name: TentExtended
attribute.semantics: Describes whether or not the tent is extended.

attribute.name: RampExtended
attribute.semantics: Describes whether or not the ramp is extended.

attribute.name: BlackoutLightsOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether blackout lights are on or off.

attribute.name: BlackoutBrakeLightsOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether blackout brake lights are on or off.

attribute.name: SpotSearchLight_1On
attribute.semantics: Describes whether spot/search light #1 is on or off.

attribute.name: InteriorLightsOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether interior lights (forward) are on or off.

attribute.name: OccupantsSurrendered
attribute.semantics: Describes whether or not the vehicle occupants have surrendered.

attribute.name: MaskedCloaked
attribute.semantics: Describes whether or not the entity is masked or cloaked.

attribute.name: RunningLightsOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether running lights are on or off.

attribute.name: IsAccommodationLadderLowered
attribute.semantics: Describes if the accommodation ladder is lowered or not.

attribute.name: IsFenceRaised
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the safety fence around a helicopter landing deck is raised.

attribute.name: IsFlagRaised
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the national identification flag is raised.

attribute.name: TowedArraySonar
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the TAS is deployed or not.

attribute.name: SlingLoadableCapability
attribute.semantics: The Entity is able to be carried as a sling load payload. The extended appearance record (if available) will identify if it is currently sling loaded and entity association and/or entity offset records (if available) will provide additional sling load details (such as carrier).

attribute.name: IEDPresenceIndicator
attribute.semantics: The Entity is an IED or contains an IED. The extended appearance record (if available) will identify how well hidden the IED is on the Entity. An Attached Part (if applicable, for instance a jury-rigged munition does not apply here) will identify the IED explicitly.

attribute.name: TaskOrganizableCapability
attribute.semantics: The Entity (normally a virtual manned module) can be task organized into an existing mixed mode unit (where mixed mode is intended to comprise a combination of computer-generated forces and virtual or even live forces).

objectClass.name: GroundVehicle
objectClass.semantics: A platform entity that operates wholly on the surface of the earth.

attribute.name: FirePowerKilled
attribute.semantics: Describes whether it can fire weapons.

attribute.name: TrailingDustCloud
attribute.semantics: Describes the size of the dust cloud trailing effect.

attribute.name: PrimaryHatch
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the primary hatch is open or closed and whether someone is visible.

attribute.name: HeadLightsOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether head lights are on or off.

attribute.name: TailLightsOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether tail lights are on or off.

attribute.name: BrakeLightsOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether brake lights are on or off.

attribute.name: LauncherOperational
attribute.semantics: Describes the status of the mechanism required for the platform to be operational, such as the elevated status of the primary launcher.

attribute.name: CamouflageType
attribute.semantics: Describes the camouflage color.

attribute.name: ConcealedPosition
attribute.semantics: Describes the type of concealment.

attribute.name: TentExtended
attribute.semantics: Describes whether or not the tent is extended.

attribute.name: RampExtended
attribute.semantics: Describes whether or not the ramp is extended.

attribute.name: BlackoutLightsOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether blackout lights are on or off.

attribute.name: BlackoutBrakeLightsOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether blackout brake lights are on or off.

attribute.name: SpotSearchLight_1On
attribute.semantics: Describes whether spot/search light #1 is on or off.

attribute.name: InteriorLightsForwardOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether interior lights (forward) are on or off.

attribute.name: OccupantsSurrendered
attribute.semantics: Describes whether or not the vehicle occupants have surrendered.

attribute.name: MaskedCloaked
attribute.semantics: Describes whether or not the entity is masked or cloaked.

attribute.name: SlingLoadableCapability
attribute.semantics: The Entity is able to be carried as a sling load payload. The extended appearance record (if available) will identify if it is currently sling loaded and entity association and/or entity offset records (if available) will provide additional sling load details (such as carrier).

attribute.name: IEDPresenceIndicator
attribute.semantics: The Entity is an IED or contains an IED. The extended appearance record (if available) will identify how well hidden the IED is on the Entity. An Attached Part (if applicable, for instance a jury-rigged munition does not apply here) will identify the IED explicitly.

attribute.name: TaskOrganizableCapability
attribute.semantics: The Entity (normally a virtual manned module) can be task organized into an existing mixed mode unit (where mixed mode is intended to comprise a combination of computer-generated forces and virtual or even live forces).

objectClass.name: MultiDomainPlatform
objectClass.semantics: A platform entity that operates in more than one domain (excluding those combinations explicitly defined as subclasses of the superclass of this class).

attribute.name: FirePowerKilled
attribute.semantics: Describes whether it can fire weapons.

attribute.name: TrailingEffects
attribute.semantics: Describes the size of the dust cloud, contrails or ionization, or wake trailing effects.

attribute.name: Hatch
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the (primary) hatch is open or closed.

attribute.name: HeadLightsOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether head lights are on or off.

attribute.name: TailLightsOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether tail lights are on or off.

attribute.name: BrakeLightsOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether brake lights are on or off.

attribute.name: LauncherOperational
attribute.semantics: Describes the status of the mechanism required for the platform to be operational, such as the elevated status of the primary launcher.

attribute.name: CamouflageType
attribute.semantics: Describes the camouflage color.

attribute.name: ConcealedPosition
attribute.semantics: Describes the type of concealment.

attribute.name: TentExtended
attribute.semantics: Describes whether or not the tent is extended.

attribute.name: RampExtended
attribute.semantics: Describes whether or not the ramp is extended.

attribute.name: BlackoutLightsOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether blackout lights are on or off.

attribute.name: BlackoutBrakeLightsOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether blackout brake lights are on or off.

attribute.name: SpotSearchLight_1On
attribute.semantics: Describes whether spot/search light #1 is on or off.

attribute.name: InteriorLightsOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether interior lights (forward) are on or off.

attribute.name: OccupantsSurrendered
attribute.semantics: Describes whether or not the vehicle occupants have surrendered.

attribute.name: MaskedCloaked
attribute.semantics: Describes whether or not the entity is masked or cloaked.

attribute.name: RunningLightsOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether running lights are on or off.

attribute.name: IsAccommodationLadderLowered
attribute.semantics: Describes if the accommodation ladder is lowered or not.

attribute.name: IsFenceRaised
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the safety fence around a helicopter landing deck is raised.

attribute.name: IsFlagRaised
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the national identification flag is raised.

attribute.name: TowedArraySonar
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the TAS is deployed or not.

attribute.name: Periscope
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the periscope is extended or not.

attribute.name: Snorkel
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the snorkel is extended or not.

attribute.name: RadarMast
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the radar mast is extended or not.

attribute.name: CommsMast
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the communication mast is extended or not.

attribute.name: ESMMast
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the ESM mast is extended or not.

attribute.name: TorpedoTubes
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the torpedo tubes are open or not.

attribute.name: MissileHatches
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the missile hatches are open or not.

attribute.name: NVGMode
attribute.semantics: Describes whether air platform lighting is in covert or overt mode.

attribute.name: CanopyTroopDoor
attribute.semantics: Describes the state of the canopy/troop door.

attribute.name: LandingLightsOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether landing lights are on or off.

attribute.name: NavigationLightsOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether navigation lights are on or off.

attribute.name: AntiCollisionLightsOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether Anti-Collision lights are on or off.

attribute.name: AfterburnerOn
attribute.semantics: Describes if the air platform is in afterburner.

attribute.name: LowerAntiCollisionLightOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the lower Anti-Collision light is on or off.

attribute.name: UpperAntiCollisionLightOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the upper Anti-Collision light is on or off.

attribute.name: AntiCollisionLightDayNight
attribute.semantics: Describes the day/night status of the Anti-Collision lights.

attribute.name: IsBlinking
attribute.semantics: Indicates whether any air platform lights are blinking or not.

attribute.name: FormationLightsOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether formation lights are on or off.

attribute.name: LandingGearExtended
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the landing gear is wholly retracted or extended.

attribute.name: CargoDoorsOpened
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the cargo doors (main door) are closed or open.

attribute.name: NavigationPositionBrightness
attribute.semantics: Describes the brightness of the navigation/position lights.

attribute.name: ReverseThrustEngaged
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the air platform has engaged reverse thrust.

attribute.name: WeightOnWheels
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the air platform has weight on its main landing gear.

attribute.name: ADSBCapability
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the entity is equipped with Automatic Dependent Surveillance - Broadcast (ADS-B).

attribute.name: SlingLoadCarrierCapability
attribute.semantics: The Entity is able to carry a payload in a sling load. The extended appearance record (if available) will identify the current sling load status and entity association and/or entity offset records (if available) will provide additional sling load details (such as payload).

attribute.name: SlingLoadableCapability
attribute.semantics: The Entity is able to be carried as a sling load payload. The extended appearance record (if available) will identify if it is currently sling loaded and entity association and/or entity offset records (if available) will provide additional sling load details (such as carrier).

attribute.name: IEDPresenceIndicator
attribute.semantics: The Entity is an IED or contains an IED. The extended appearance record (if available) will identify how well hidden the IED is on the Entity. An Attached Part (if applicable, for instance a jury-rigged munition does not apply here) will identify the IED explicitly.

attribute.name: TaskOrganizableCapability
attribute.semantics: The Entity (normally a virtual manned module) can be task organized into an existing mixed mode unit (where mixed mode is intended to comprise a combination of computer-generated forces and virtual or even live forces).

attribute.name: LAIRCMCapability
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the entity is equipped with Large Aircraft Infrared Countermeasures (LAIRCM).

objectClass.name: Spacecraft
objectClass.semantics: A platform entity that operates mainly in space.

objectClass.name: SubmersibleVessel
objectClass.semantics: A platform entity that operates either on the surface of the sea, or beneath it.

attribute.name: Hatch
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the hatch is open or closed.

attribute.name: RunningLightsOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether running lights are on or off.

attribute.name: Periscope
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the periscope is extended or not.

attribute.name: Snorkel
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the snorkel is extended or not.

attribute.name: RadarMast
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the radar mast is extended or not.

attribute.name: CommsMast
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the communication mast is extended or not.

attribute.name: ESMMast
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the ESM mast is extended or not.

attribute.name: TorpedoTubes
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the torpedo tubes are open or not.

attribute.name: MissileHatches
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the missile hatches are open or not.

attribute.name: TowedArraySonar
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the TAS is deployed or not.

attribute.name: SlingLoadableCapability
attribute.semantics: The Entity is able to be carried as a sling load payload. The extended appearance record (if available) will identify if it is currently sling loaded and entity association and/or entity offset records (if available) will provide additional sling load details (such as carrier).

attribute.name: IEDPresenceIndicator
attribute.semantics: The Entity is an IED or contains an IED. The extended appearance record (if available) will identify how well hidden the IED is on the Entity. An Attached Part (if applicable, for instance a jury-rigged munition does not apply here) will identify the IED explicitly.

attribute.name: TaskOrganizableCapability
attribute.semantics: The Entity (normally a virtual manned module) can be task organized into an existing mixed mode unit (where mixed mode is intended to comprise a combination of computer-generated forces and virtual or even live forces).

objectClass.name: SurfaceVessel
objectClass.semantics: A platform entity that operates wholly on the surface of the sea.

attribute.name: WakeSize
attribute.semantics: Describes the size of the wake trailing effect.

attribute.name: RunningLightsOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether running lights are on or off.

attribute.name: IsAccommodationLadderLowered
attribute.semantics: Describes if the accommodation ladder is lowered or not.

attribute.name: IsFenceRaised
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the safety fence around a helicopter landing deck is raised.

attribute.name: IsFlagRaised
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the national identification flag is raised.

attribute.name: TowedArraySonar
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the TAS is deployed or not.

attribute.name: SpotLightsOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether spot lights are on or off.

attribute.name: InteriorLightsOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether interior lights are on or off.

attribute.name: SlingLoadableCapability
attribute.semantics: The Entity is able to be carried as a sling load payload. The extended appearance record (if available) will identify if it is currently sling loaded and entity association and/or entity offset records (if available) will provide additional sling load details (such as carrier).

attribute.name: IEDPresenceIndicator
attribute.semantics: The Entity is an IED or contains an IED. The extended appearance record (if available) will identify how well hidden the IED is on the Entity. An Attached Part (if applicable, for instance a jury-rigged munition does not apply here) will identify the IED explicitly.

attribute.name: TaskOrganizableCapability
attribute.semantics: The Entity (normally a virtual manned module) can be task organized into an existing mixed mode unit (where mixed mode is intended to comprise a combination of computer-generated forces and virtual or even live forces).

objectClass.name: Lifeform
objectClass.semantics: A living military platform (human or not).

attribute.name: Health
attribute.semantics: Describes the visual appearance of the severity of any injury.

attribute.name: MountedHoistedStatus
attribute.semantics: Describes whether or not the life form is mounted/hoisted on another platform, such as a troop transport or helicopter hoist.

attribute.name: AmmunitionSupplyCapability
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the entity is able to supply some type of ammunition in response to an appropriate service request.

attribute.name: FuelSupplyCapability
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the entity is able to supply some type of fuel in response to an appropriate service request.

attribute.name: RecoveryCapability
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the entity is able to provide recovery (e.g., towing) services in response to an appropriate service request.

attribute.name: RepairCapability
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the entity is able to supply certain repair services in response to an appropriate service request.

attribute.name: PaintScheme
attribute.semantics: Describes the visual paint design.

attribute.name: ComplianceStatus
attribute.semantics: Describes the manner and degree to which the life form is complying.

attribute.name: ClothingIRSignature
attribute.semantics: Describes the general nature of the IR Signature due to clothing or covering.

attribute.name: SignalSmokeInUse
attribute.semantics: Describes whether signal smoke is being used or not.

attribute.name: FlashLightsOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether flash lights are on or off.

attribute.name: SignalMirrorInUse
attribute.semantics: Describes whether a signal mirror is being used or not.

attribute.name: IRStrobeOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether an IR strobe is on or off.

attribute.name: IRIlluminatorOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether an IR illuminator (flare) is on or off.

attribute.name: LifeFormPosture
attribute.semantics: Describes the posture (position) of the life form.

attribute.name: IsSmokingCigarette
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the life form has a lit cigarette or not. The primary purpose is for IR signature generation, so it could be a cigar or other item.

attribute.name: WeaponImplement1
attribute.semantics: Describes the position of the life form's primary weapon/implement.

attribute.name: WeaponImplement2
attribute.semantics: Describes the position of the life form's secondary weapon/implement.

attribute.name: CamouflageType
attribute.semantics: Describes the camouflage color.

attribute.name: ConcealedStationary
attribute.semantics: Describes whether or not the life form is in a prepared concealed position.

attribute.name: ConcealedMovement
attribute.semantics: Describes whether or not the life form uses concealment during movement.

objectClass.name: NonHuman
objectClass.semantics: An animal or other non-human lifeform.

objectClass.name: CulturalFeature
objectClass.semantics: Engineering and natural effects such as craters, bridges, vehicle tracks, etc.

attribute.name: DamageArea
attribute.semantics: Describes the damaged area.

attribute.name: Damage
attribute.semantics: Describes the damaged appearance.

attribute.name: IsSmokeEmanating
attribute.semantics: Describes whether or not smoke is emanating from the entity.

attribute.name: IsFlaming
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the entity is burning and flames are visible.

attribute.name: InternalHeatOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the internal heat is on or off.

attribute.name: ExteriorLightsOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the exterior lights are on or off.

attribute.name: InteriorLightsOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the interior lights are on or off.

attribute.name: MaskedCloaked
attribute.semantics: Describes whether or not the entity is masked or cloaked.

attribute.name: SlingLoadableCapability
attribute.semantics: The Entity is able to be carried as a sling load payload. The extended appearance record (if available) will identify if it is currently sling loaded and entity association and/or entity offset records (if available) will provide additional sling load details (such as carrier).

attribute.name: IEDPresenceIndicator
attribute.semantics: The Entity is an IED or contains an IED. The extended appearance record (if available) will identify how well hidden the IED is on the Entity. An Attached Part (if applicable, for instance a jury-rigged munition does not apply here) will identify the IED explicitly.

objectClass.name: Munition
objectClass.semantics: A complete device charged with explosives, propellants, pyrotechnics, initiating composition, or nuclear, biological or chemical material for use in military operations, including demolitions.

attribute.name: Damage
attribute.semantics: Describes the damaged appearance.

attribute.name: IsSmokeVaporEmanating
attribute.semantics: Describes whether or not smoke or vapor is emanating from the entity.

attribute.name: IsEngineEmittingSmoke
attribute.semantics: Describes whether or not the engine is emitting smoke.

attribute.name: VaporTrailSize
attribute.semantics: Describes the size of the vapor trail.

attribute.name: IsFlaming
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the entity is burning and flames are visible.

attribute.name: LaunchFlashPresent
attribute.semantics: Describes whether or not the guided munition's launch flash is present.

attribute.name: PowerPlantOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the power plant is on or off.

attribute.name: CoverShroudStatus
attribute.semantics: Describes the status of the cover or shroud.

attribute.name: MaskedCloaked
attribute.semantics: Describes whether or not the entity is masked or cloaked.

attribute.name: IEDPresenceIndicator
attribute.semantics: The Entity is an IED or contains an IED. The extended appearance record (if available) will identify how well hidden the IED is on the Entity. An Attached Part (if applicable, for instance a jury-rigged munition does not apply here) will identify the IED explicitly.

objectClass.name: Expendables
objectClass.semantics: Countermeasures devices that are dispensed from another entity. The devices may be active emitters or passive reflectors of energy.

attribute.name: Damage
attribute.semantics: Describes the damaged appearance.

attribute.name: IsSmokeEmanating
attribute.semantics: Describes whether or not smoke is emanating from the entity.

attribute.name: ParachuteStatus
attribute.semantics: Describes the status of a flare's parachute.

attribute.name: FlareSmokeColor
attribute.semantics: Describes the color of a flare's light output or the color of smoke emanating from a smoke expendable.

attribute.name: IsFlaming
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the entity is burning and flames are visible.

attribute.name: LaunchFlashPresent
attribute.semantics: Describes whether or not launch flash is present.

attribute.name: FlareSmokeStatus
attribute.semantics: Describes the status of a flare or smoke expendable.

attribute.name: PowerPlantOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the power plant is on or off.

attribute.name: SpotChaffStatus
attribute.semantics: Describes the status of spot chaff.

attribute.name: MaskedCloaked
attribute.semantics: Describes whether or not the entity is masked or cloaked.

objectClass.name: Radio
objectClass.semantics: Electronic devices for the communication of both audio and data, operated by entities belonging to armed forces.

objectClass.name: Sensor
objectClass.semantics: Sensors and emitters, such as stand-alone radars, jammers, and detection systems, that are not part of another platform or system described by another Physical Entity, and are operated by armed forces.

attribute.name: PaintScheme
attribute.semantics: Describes the visual paint design.

attribute.name: MobilityKilled
attribute.semantics: Describes whether it is capable of moving on its own power.

attribute.name: MissionKilled
attribute.semantics: Describes whether it is capable of carrying out its mission (e.g., damaged antenna).

attribute.name: Damage
attribute.semantics: Describes the damaged appearance.

attribute.name: IsSmokeEmanating
attribute.semantics: Describes whether or not smoke is emanating from the entity.

attribute.name: IsEngineEmittingSmoke
attribute.semantics: Describes whether or not the engine is emitting smoke.

attribute.name: TrailingEffects
attribute.semantics: Describes the size of the trailing effects.

attribute.name: LightsOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the lights are on or off.

attribute.name: IsFlaming
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the entity is burning and flames are visible.

attribute.name: AntennaRaised
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the antenna is raised or not.

attribute.name: CamouflageType
attribute.semantics: Describes the camouflage color.

attribute.name: ConcealedPosition
attribute.semantics: Describes the type of concealment.

attribute.name: PowerPlantOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the power plant is on or off.

attribute.name: TentExtended
attribute.semantics: Describes whether or not the tent is extended.

attribute.name: BlackoutLightsOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether blackout lights are on or off.

attribute.name: InteriorLightsOn
attribute.semantics: Describes whether interior lights are on or off.

attribute.name: SlingLoadableCapability
attribute.semantics: The Entity is able to be carried as a sling load payload. The extended appearance record (if available) will identify if it is currently sling loaded and entity association and/or entity offset records (if available) will provide additional sling load details (such as carrier).

attribute.name: IEDPresenceIndicator
attribute.semantics: The Entity is an IED or contains an IED. The extended appearance record (if available) will identify how well hidden the IED is on the Entity. An Attached Part (if applicable, for instance a jury-rigged munition does not apply here) will identify the IED explicitly.

attribute.name: TaskOrganizableCapability
attribute.semantics: The Entity (normally a virtual manned module) can be task organized into an existing mixed mode unit (where mixed mode is intended to comprise a combination of computer-generated forces and virtual or even live forces).

objectClass.name: Supplies
objectClass.semantics: Supplies other than munitions, such as fuel, food and personnel.

attribute.name: PaintScheme
attribute.semantics: Describes the visual paint design.

attribute.name: Damage
attribute.semantics: Describes the damaged appearance.

attribute.name: ParachuteStatus
attribute.semantics: Describes the status of a supply's parachute.

attribute.name: IsFlaming
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the entity is burning and flames are visible.

attribute.name: DeployedStatus
attribute.semantics: Describes the deployed status.

attribute.name: MaskedCloaked
attribute.semantics: Describes whether or not the entity is masked or cloaked.

attribute.name: AmmunitionSupplyCapability
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the entity is able to supply some type of ammunition in response to an appropriate service request.

attribute.name: FuelSupplyCapability
attribute.semantics: Describes whether the entity is able to supply some type of fuel in response to an appropriate service request.

attribute.name: SlingLoadableCapability
attribute.semantics: The Entity is able to be carried as a sling load payload. The extended appearance record (if available) will identify if it is currently sling loaded and entity association and/or entity offset records (if available) will provide additional sling load details (such as carrier).

attribute.name: IEDPresenceIndicator
attribute.semantics: The Entity is an IED or contains an IED. The extended appearance record (if available) will identify how well hidden the IED is on the Entity. An Attached Part (if applicable, for instance a jury-rigged munition does not apply here) will identify the IED explicitly.

interactionClass.name: Collision
interactionClass.semantics: The act or instance of coming together with solid impact.

parameter.name: CollidingObjectIdentifier
parameter.semantics: The object instance ID of the object that the issuing object has collided with.

parameter.name: IssuingObjectMass
parameter.semantics: The mass of the issuing object.

parameter.name: IssuingObjectVelocityVector
parameter.semantics: The velocity vector of the issuing object at the moment of impact.

parameter.name: CollisionLocation
parameter.semantics: The location of the collision relative to the object that the issuing object has collided with.

parameter.name: EventIdentifier
parameter.semantics: An ID assigned by the issuing object to associate related collision events.

parameter.name: IssuingObjectIdentifier
parameter.semantics: The object instance ID of the object that has detected the collision and issued the collision interaction.

interactionClass.name: CollisionElastic
interactionClass.semantics: The act or instance of coming together with solid impact in an elastic manner. An elastic collision allows a higher fidelity collision to be modeled, taking into account linear and rotational momentum transfer, variable elasticity, and momentum transfer that is dependent on surface orientation.

parameter.name: CoefficientOfRestitution
parameter.semantics: The degree that energy is conserved in a collision.

parameter.name: IntermediateResultXX
parameter.semantics: X-X Component of the positive semi-definite Collision Intermediate Result matrix.

parameter.name: IntermediateResultXY
parameter.semantics: X-Y Component of the positive semi-definite Collision Intermediate Result matrix.

parameter.name: IntermediateResultXZ
parameter.semantics: X-Z Component of the positive semi-definite Collision Intermediate Result matrix.

parameter.name: IntermediateResultYY
parameter.semantics: Y-Y Component of the positive semi-definite Collision Intermediate Result matrix.

parameter.name: IntermediateResultYZ
parameter.semantics: Y-Z Component of the positive semi-definite Collision Intermediate Result matrix.

parameter.name: IntermediateResultZZ
parameter.semantics: Z-Z Component of the positive semi-definite Collision Intermediate Result matrix.

parameter.name: UnitSurfaceNormal
parameter.semantics: The normal vector to the surface at the point of collision detection.

simpleData.name: PowerSettingFloat32
simpleData.semantics: A normalized value indicating the operator's power controller setting (e.g., the throttle position). In normal operation, the value shall be set in the range of POWER_IDLE (fixed value: 0.0) to POWER_MILITARY (maximum without afterburner; fixed value: 50.0) inclusive, proportional to the controller position. If an afterburner is engaged, the setting shall be in the range of POWER_MIN_AFTERBURNER (fixed value: 51.0) to POWER_MAX_AFTERBURNER (fixed value: 100.0) inclusive. If the propulsion system is off, the setting shall be set to POWER_ENGINE_OFF (fixed value: -100.0).

simpleData.name: RevolutionsPerMinuteFloat32
simpleData.semantics: Rotation speed expressed in revolutions per minute.

simpleData.name: VelocityDecimeterPerSecondInteger16
simpleData.semantics: Velocity/Speed measured in decimeter per second.

arrayData.name: MarkingArray11
arrayData.semantics: String of characters represented by an 11 element character string.

arrayData.name: PropulsionSystemDataStructArray
arrayData.semantics: A set of Propulsion System Data descriptions.

arrayData.name: VectoringNozzleSystemDataStructArray
arrayData.semantics: A set of Vectoring Nozzle System Data description.

fixedRecordData.name: DEDamageDescriptionComponentVisualDamageStatusDataStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: DE Damage Description-Component Visual Damage Status.

field.name: IsFirePresent
field.semantics: Describes presence of fire at the damage site.

field.name: Smoke
field.semantics: Describes presence of smoke emanating from the damage site.

field.name: SurfaceDamage
field.semantics: Describes general surface appearance at the damage site.

fixedRecordData.name: DirectedEnergyDamageDescriptionStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Detailed damage sustained by an entity due to directed energy.

field.name: DamageLocation
field.semantics: The location of the centroid of the damage location in the entity's coordinate frame.

field.name: DamageDiameter
field.semantics: The size of the damaged location.

field.name: Temperature
field.semantics: The average temperature of the damaged region.

field.name: ComponentIdentification
field.semantics: Component Identification.

field.name: ComponentDamageStatus
field.semantics: Component Damage Status.

field.name: ComponentVisualDamageStatus
field.semantics: Component Visual Damage Status.

field.name: ComponentVisualSmokeColor
field.semantics: Component Visual Smoke Color.

field.name: EventIdentifier
field.semantics: Association to related (DE) fire and detonation events.

fixedRecordData.name: EntityCoordinateVectorStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Vector in the entity coordinate system. Based on the Entity Coordinate Vector record as specified in IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Section 6.2.96 item a.

field.name: XComponent
field.semantics: Component along the X axis.

field.name: YComponent
field.semantics: Component along the Y axis.

field.name: ZComponent
field.semantics: Component along the Z axis.

fixedRecordData.name: MarkingStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Character set used in the marking and the string of characters to be interpreted for display.

field.name: MarkingEncodingType
field.semantics: Character set representation.

field.name: MarkingData
field.semantics: 11 element character string.

fixedRecordData.name: PropulsionSystemDataStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Information describing a propulsion system in terms of power settings and current RPM.

field.name: PowerSetting
field.semantics: The power setting of the propulsion system, after any response lags have been incorporated.

field.name: EngineRPM
field.semantics: The current engine speed.

fixedRecordData.name: VectoringNozzleSystemDataStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Operational data for describing the vectoring nozzle systems being simulated.

field.name: HorizontalDeflectionAngle
field.semantics: The nozzle deflection angle in the horizontal body axis of the entity.

field.name: VerticalDeflectionAngle
field.semantics: The nozzle deflection angle in the vertical body axis of the entity.

variantRecordData.name: DamageDescriptionVariantStruct
variantRecordData.semantics: Variant record for specifying detailed information on the entity damage state.

note.label: RPRnotePhysical13
note.semantics: For the Air Domain named 'Propulsion Killed' in SISO-REF-010.

note.label: RPRnotePhysical25
note.semantics: For the Land Domain named 'Trailing Dust Cloud' and for the Surface Domain named 'Wake Size' in SISO-REF-010.

note.label: RPRnotePhysical30
note.semantics: For the Surface Domain named 'Spot Lights On' in SISO-REF-010.

note.label: RPRnotePhysical31
note.semantics: For the Land Domain named 'Interior Lights (Forward) On' in SISO-REF-010.

note.label: RPRnotePhysical32
note.semantics: For the Land Domain named 'Primary Hatch' in SISO-REF-010. If the entity can operate beneath the surface of the sea, the valid values may need to be limited to 0, 1, and 4, in accordance with AppearanceSubsurfaceHatchEnum8.

note.label: RPRnotePhysical58
note.semantics: If there is no object instance associated with the parameter, then this should be set to the empty string (no characters). Refer to SISO-STD-001 Section 7.8.6 for handling empty strings.

note.label: RPRnotePhysical59
note.semantics: This must reference a valid object instance.

note.label: RPRnotePhysical60
note.semantics: If the entity does not model or otherwise cannot provide this information, a value of -273.15 °C shall be used.

note.label: RPRnotePhysical61
note.semantics: If no fire or detonation event is applicable, this field shall be set to all zeroes.

note.label: RPRnotePhysical62
note.semantics: The units and semantics for the MarkingData array elements are specified by the value of the MarkingEncodingType.
